EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MENESES, PAULA BOOTH, CRYSTAL

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MENESES, PAULA BOOTH, CRYSTAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEADE, GARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENESES, PAULA BOOTH, CRYSTAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 733 FILLMORE STREET #10, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94117, LEASE FORFEITED, **TO INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS/TENANTS.**
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $35.50 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEADE, GARY
